title: Pilatos #4091
definition:
Pilate = "armed with a spear"

 1) the sixth Roman procurator of Judah and Samaria who ordered Christ
    to be crucified
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pilate = "armed with a spear"

 1) the sixth Roman procurator of Judah and Samaria who ordered Christ
    to be crucified

    NASB:  Pilate, a Rom. procurator of Judea:
